name: Murmuration
description: A 3D starling murmuration against a dusk sky — a dense flock (Murmuration3D parametric-ellipse: ~14K birds spring-pulled to home slots in a continuously morphing 3D ellipsoid, perspective + depth fade + real banking) that churns internally, wheels as a comma, drifts across the sky, and rolls dark bands through itself. Music drives the GLOBAL envelope (design §13.5): energy → the flock's vigor (morph pace), swell/elongation and drift range; beats → a gated agitation/banking wave; vocals → density breathing. Built MM.6 by lifting the proven 40-round 2D flock to 3D after the emergent-Flock2 rebuild failed M7 ×7 (design §13). Loose-but-musical coupling, Matt-reviewed.
author: Matt
